name: Ezo Pmp → Pause Dosing
description: Use this action to pause a Dosing command that was previously issued. To determine if the dosing is paused or not, you can use the [Is Paused](https://esphome.io/components/ezo_pmp#ezo_pmp-is_paused_binary_sensor) sensor. If the pump is currently paused, issuing this action again will unpause it.
